'''鈭歞h-ch-v-p''' ('''kadhachvepoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:pule|pule]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-ch-v-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:pule|pule]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歞h-ch-v-p
|-
! Lemma
| kadhachvepoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thidhachvepoko|thidhachvepoko]] || [[word:jidhachvepoko|jidhachvepoko]] || [[word:shidhachvepoko|shidhachvepoko]] || [[word:kidhachvepoko|kidhachvepoko]]
|-

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
